name: Gav's Guns
author: Made by Gav
cardDescription: Adds custom weapons for Fortnite v27.11, including options useful for trickshotting
description:
Adds a collection of custom weapons for Fortnite v27.11, including options useful for trickshotting.

**Rideable Weapons/Items:**

- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Hook_Gun_Ride.WID_Hook_Gun_Ride`
- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Athena_PurpleMouse_Ride.WID_Athena_PurpleMouse_Ride`
- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Launcher_HomingRocket_Athena_Ride.WID_Launcher_HomingRocket_Athena_Ride`
- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Launcher_Military_Athena_Ride.WID_Launcher_Military_Athena_Ride`
- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_GrenadeLauncher_Prox_Athena_Ride.WID_GrenadeLauncher_Prox_Athena_Ride`
- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/AGID_Lotus_Mustache_Ride.AGID_Lotus_Mustache_Ride`

**Self-Ridable Weapons/Items:**

- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Launcher_Military_Athena_Ride_Self.WID_Launcher_Military_Athena_Ride_Self`
- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Launcher_Rocket_Athena_Self.WID_Launcher_Rocket_Athena_Self`

**Low Gravity Grappler (Ability to Grapple any Projectile):**

- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Hook_Gun_Ride_Low.WID_Hook_Gun_Ride_Low`

**Jules Grappler (Ability to Grapple any Projectile):**

- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Boss_GrapplingHoot_Ride.WID_Boss_GrapplingHoot_Ride`

**Low Gravity Jules Grappler (Ability to Grapple any Projectile):**

- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Boss_GrapplingHoot_Ride_Low.WID_Boss_GrapplingHoot_Ride_Low`

**OG Bolt:**

- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/OG/WID_Sniper_BoltAction_Scope_Athena_OG.WID_Sniper_BoltAction_Scope_Athena_OG`

**Flint-Knock SMG:**

- `cheat giveitem /Game/Gav/Weapons/WID_Pistol_Scavenger_Athena_Flint.WID_Pistol_Scavenger_Athena_Flint`
